app.loadingSubtitle: Please wait while we prepare your session.

errors.signupFallback: Signup failed. Please check your input.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalidPasswordPattern: Password must be 8-24 chars and include uppercase, number, and symbol.
errors.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
errors.emailNotVerified: Email verification is required. Please verify your email first.
errors.resendVerificationFallback: Could not resend verification email. Please try again.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: This email is already in use.
errors.invalidToken: The token is invalid or has expired.
errors.oauthProviderNotEnabled: This OAuth provider is not enabled.
errors.oauthIdentityConflict: This OAuth account is already linked to another user.
errors.oauthSignupFailed: Could not create an account with OAuth.
errors.oauthProviderRequestFailed: OAuth provider request failed. Please try again.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the template dashboard.

oauth.divider: Sign in with a social account

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Create a starter account for local development.
signup.configLoading: Loading server configuration. Please try again in a moment.
signup.submitBusy: Creating account and sending verification email...

password.upper: Include at least one uppercase letter.

signupEmailSent.title: Check your email
signupEmailSent.subtitle: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
signupEmailSent.description: Open your inbox and verify your email to activate your account.
signupEmailSent.accountCreatedMessage: Account has been created. Please go to the login page.
signupEmailSent.resendFallback: Could not resend verification email. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Find your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send a password reset link.
forgotPassword.configLoading: Loading server configuration. Please try again in a moment.
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: Open your inbox and use the link to continue resetting your password.
forgotPassword.requestFallback: Could not request password reset. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.missingToken: Reset token is missing. Please use the link from your email.
errors.fallback: Password reset failed. The link may be expired or invalid.

verifyEmail.loadingSubtitle: Please wait while we confirm your verification token.
verifyEmail.loadingDescription: This usually takes a few seconds.
verifyEmail.successDescription: You can now sign in with your email and password.
verifyEmail.errorSubtitle: We could not verify your email.

errors.missingToken: Verification token is missing. Please use the link from your email.
errors.fallback: Verification failed. The link may be expired or invalid.

dashboard.title: Show Case
dashboard.subtitle: Review these components and instruct the Agent which ones to use for your screen.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences.
settings.hint: Profile actions are available from the top-right menu.
